query:
SELECT 
  wc.remoteJid,
  wc.contactPushName,
  wc.lastFromMe,
  wc.lastStatus,
  wc.lastMessagePreview,
  wc.lastMessageAt,
  (SELECT m.status FROM messages m WHERE m.sessionId = wc.sessionId AND m.remoteJid = wc.remoteJid ORDER BY m.id DESC LIMIT 1) AS actualLastMsgStatus,
  (SELECT m.fromMe FROM messages m WHERE m.sessionId = wc.sessionId AND m.remoteJid = wc.remoteJid ORDER BY m.id DESC LIMIT 1) AS actualLastMsgFromMe,
  (SELECT m.status FROM messages m WHERE m.sessionId = wc.sessionId AND m.remoteJid = wc.remoteJid AND m.fromMe = 1 ORDER BY m.id DESC LIMIT 1) AS lastOutgoingMsgStatus
FROM wa_conversations wc
WHERE wc.contactPushName IN ('Rubia Coser', 'Bruno Barbosa da Silva', 'Samyo Designer', 'Sara Monte')
ORDER BY wc.lastMessageAt DESC

  (SELECT m.status FROM messages m WHERE m.sessionId = wc.sessionId AND m.remoteJid = wc.remoteJid AND m.fromMe = 1 ORDER BY m.id DESC LIMIT 1) AS lastOutgoingMsgStatus
FROM wa_conversations wc

ORDER BY wc.lastMessageAt DESC
